name: Flora Bank & Trust
description_short: Flora Bank & Trust is a community bank offering checking, savings, credit cards, loans, and mortgages with online banking and mobile access.
description_long:
Flora Bank & Trust is a traditional community bank that provides comprehensive banking and lending services to individuals and businesses. Based on their website presence and service offerings, they operate as a full-service financial institution with a focus on personal and commercial banking needs.

The bank offers a range of core banking services including checking and savings accounts, credit cards, personal loans, and mortgage lending. They provide online banking capabilities described as "safe, secure, and convenient," along with mobile banking options. Their loan products include mortgages with online application capabilities, and they maintain a loan officer team available for customer consultation. The bank has implemented internet banking sign-up and e-statement options for digital account management.

Flora Bank & Trust distinguishes itself as a community-focused institution with direct access to loan officers and a personalized service model. They maintain FDIC insurance protections for deposits and have established security protocols including a lost/stolen debit card reporting system with after-hours toll-free support (1-888-227-3096). Their routing number is 081224724, indicating they are an established financial institution in the banking system.

As a traditional community bank, Flora Bank & Trust serves customers seeking local banking relationships with standard deposit and lending products. However, prospective customers should note that the website provides limited detailed information about specific product terms, rates, fees, or competitive advantages. The institution appears to operate primarily through traditional banking channels with web-based supplementary services rather than as a digital-first bank. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Money market or CD products (implied by APY references)
Internet banking platform with online account access
Loan officer consultation and customer service
pros: Online mortgage application available for home loans
24/7 toll-free debit card reporting for lost or stolen cards
Internet banking and mobile banking options for digital account access
Direct access to loan officers for personalized consultation
Credit cards now available with online application process
Established routing number (081224724) indicating long-term institutional presence
cons: Website provides minimal details on interest rates, APYs, or fee structures for products
Limited information about credit card options, rewards, or terms available
No clear information on loan types, eligibility requirements, or competitive rates
Geographic availability and service area not specified on website
Mortgage application requires external link/iframe with no rate or product details provided
best_for: Local customers seeking traditional community bank relationships
Homebuyers interested in mortgage lending with personal loan officer assistance
Individuals wanting FDIC-protected deposits with online banking convenience
Small business owners seeking local bank relationships for business and personal banking
diagnosis: Flora Bank & Trust is best for customers in their service area seeking traditional community banking with a mix of digital and personal service options. The main caveat is that their website lacks transparent product details—rates, fees, terms, and specific offerings are not publicly available, requiring direct customer contact to compare against other banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
